title: Absolute No Fire
description: Removes all fire visuals from both the screen and ground!
body:
## 🔥 No Fire Overlay Resource Pack

Removes all fire visuals from both the screen and the ground, giving you a clear and unobstructed view during combat.
Perfectly optimized for CPvP (Crystal PvP), where visibility and fast reactions are critical.

🎄 No screen fire
🎄 No ground fire
🎄 Cleaner visuals
🎄 Better focus during fights

Designed to give you maximum clarity without changing gameplay mechanics.
